name: treatment-page
description: A situational SEO page builder. Researches a veterinary treatment, evaluates whether insurance content is relevant, then writes and SEO-checks the page.

steps.instruction:
Research the {treatment} for {animal}: what it is, when it's needed,
typical cost ranges, and what pet owners worry about.
steps.title: Research

steps.instruction:
Pull the search demand for '{treatment} {animal}' from DataForSEO: head term,
long-tail variants, and the questions people actually ask. This shapes the
title, headings, and FAQ downstream.
steps.title: Keyword Research

steps.instruction:
Evaluate whether pet insurance meaningfully affects how an owner approaches
{treatment}. Write an artifact explaining the decision with evidence. If insurance is relevant, include what comparison work is needed. If it is not relevant, document why no insurance section is needed.
steps.title: Evaluate Insurance Relevance

steps.instruction: Read the insurance relevance artifact. If insurance is relevant, compare how the major pet insurers cover {treatment} for {animal}: what's included, typical excess, and any waiting periods. If insurance is not relevant, write an artifact documenting that no insurer comparison is needed and cite the relevance decision.
steps.title: Compare Insurers

steps.instruction:
Write the {treatment} page for {animal} owners using {research}.
If an {insurance_table} exists, weave it in as a dedicated section.
steps.title: Write Page

steps.instruction:
Audit {page} for SEO: title tag, meta description, heading hierarchy,
internal links, and the target keyword '{treatment} {animal}'.
steps.title: Seo Check
